ideation.label: Problem Clarity
ideation.prompt: Is the problem being solved well-defined and specific? Score 0.0 (vague or unstated) to 1.0 (a concrete, narrowly-scoped problem with a clear sufferer).

ideation.label: Solution Originality
ideation.prompt: Does the solution approach differ meaningfully from what already exists? Score 0.0 (a clone of existing offerings) to 1.0 (a genuinely distinct approach).

ideation.label: Founder-Domain Fit
ideation.prompt: Does the team have relevant domain knowledge or lived experience of this problem? Score 0.0 (no evident relevant background) to 1.0 (deep, demonstrated domain expertise).

ideation.label: Idea Testability
ideation.prompt: Can the core hypothesis be tested quickly and cheaply? Score 0.0 (requires large upfront investment to validate) to 1.0 (a cheap, fast experiment would validate it).

market.label: TAM Evidence
market.prompt: Does the profile contain evidence or credible estimates of the total addressable market size? Score 0.0 (no mention) to 1.0 (specific, sourced figures).

market.label: ICP Specificity
market.prompt: How specifically is the ideal customer profile described? Score 0.0 (generic, e.g. 'SMEs') to 1.0 (a specific segment with geography, pain point, and buying trigger).

market.label: Willingness-to-Pay Signal
market.prompt: Is there evidence customers would pay, and at what price? Score 0.0 (no signal) to 1.0 (clear paid commitments or strong pricing evidence).

market.label: Competitive Differentiation
market.prompt: How distinct is the offering versus named alternatives? Score 0.0 (indistinguishable) to 1.0 (a clear, defensible difference).

market.label: Market Timing
market.prompt: Is there a reason this works now that did not exist two years ago? Score 0.0 (no timing rationale) to 1.0 (a strong, specific 'why now').

product.label: MVP Existence
product.prompt: Is there a working prototype, MVP, or demo? Score 0.0 (idea only) to 1.0 (a usable product in the hands of users).

product.label: Technical Feasibility
product.prompt: Can this be built with available technology and the team's skills? Score 0.0 (major unsolved technical risk) to 1.0 (clearly feasible).

product.label: Core Features Defined
product.prompt: Are the must-have features clearly specified? Score 0.0 (undefined scope) to 1.0 (a crisp, prioritised feature set).

product.label: UX Considered
product.prompt: Has the user experience been explicitly designed or tested? Score 0.0 (no UX consideration) to 1.0 (designed and validated with users).

brand.label: Brand Identity
brand.prompt: Does the venture have a distinct name, visual identity, and positioning? Score 0.0 (none) to 1.0 (a coherent, distinctive brand).

brand.label: Innovation Degree
brand.prompt: How novel is this relative to incumbent solutions? Score 0.0 (incremental) to 1.0 (a breakthrough or category-defining innovation).

brand.label: IP Awareness
brand.prompt: Has the team considered patents, trademarks, or trade secrets? Score 0.0 (no IP consideration) to 1.0 (an explicit, appropriate IP strategy).

business-model.label: Revenue Model Clarity
business-model.prompt: Is there a clear, specific way the venture makes money? Score 0.0 (unclear) to 1.0 (a well-defined revenue model).

business-model.label: Unit Economics Viability
business-model.prompt: Are LTV/CAC or equivalent unit metrics defined and plausible? Score 0.0 (undefined) to 1.0 (defined and clearly viable).

business-model.label: Pricing Strategy
business-model.prompt: Is pricing justified relative to value delivered and competitors? Score 0.0 (arbitrary or unstated) to 1.0 (a deliberate, value-based pricing strategy).

business-model.label: Path to Profitability
business-model.prompt: Is there a plausible timeline to positive margins? Score 0.0 (no path) to 1.0 (a credible path to profitability).

legal.label: Corporate Structure
legal.prompt: Is the entity properly registered, or is there a concrete plan to register? Score 0.0 (none) to 1.0 (properly structured).

legal.label: Regulatory Compliance
legal.prompt: Are the applicable local regulations identified and addressed? Score 0.0 (ignored) to 1.0 (identified and actively addressed).

legal.label: IP Protection
legal.prompt: Are key IP assets legally protected or in the process of being protected? Score 0.0 (unprotected) to 1.0 (protected or filing in progress).

legal.label: Environmental Awareness
legal.prompt: Has environmental impact been considered in the business model? Score 0.0 (not considered) to 1.0 (explicitly considered and addressed).

operations.label: Team Completeness
operations.prompt: Do the founders collectively cover the key skill areas (technical, business, domain)? Score 0.0 (major gaps) to 1.0 (a complete founding team).

operations.label: Process Definition
operations.prompt: Are core operational processes documented or planned? Score 0.0 (ad hoc) to 1.0 (well-documented processes).

operations.label: Supplier Readiness
operations.prompt: Are key suppliers, vendors, or partners identified? Score 0.0 (none identified) to 1.0 (secured key partners).

operations.label: Operational Capacity
operations.prompt: Can the team handle near-term growth without immediate hiring? Score 0.0 (already at capacity) to 1.0 (clear headroom).

marketing.label: Go-to-Market Strategy
marketing.prompt: Is there a specific plan for reaching the first 100 customers? Score 0.0 (none) to 1.0 (a concrete, actionable GTM plan).

marketing.label: Channel Identification
marketing.prompt: Are the most effective acquisition channels identified? Score 0.0 (unknown) to 1.0 (validated channels).

marketing.label: Messaging Clarity
marketing.prompt: Is the value proposition communicated in one clear sentence? Score 0.0 (confusing) to 1.0 (a crisp, compelling one-liner).

marketing.label: Content / Audience Presence
marketing.prompt: Is there any existing content, community, or audience? Score 0.0 (none) to 1.0 (an engaged audience or content engine).

sales.label: Pipeline Existence
sales.prompt: Are there identified leads, prospects, or signed pilots? Score 0.0 (none) to 1.0 (a healthy qualified pipeline).

sales.label: Sales Process Defined
sales.prompt: Is there a repeatable process from lead to close? Score 0.0 (none) to 1.0 (a documented, repeatable sales process).

sales.label: Conversion Evidence
sales.prompt: Has anyone actually paid or firmly committed to pay? Score 0.0 (no conversions) to 1.0 (repeatable conversions).

sales.label: Revenue Traction
sales.prompt: Is there any recurring revenue or signed contracts? Score 0.0 (none) to 1.0 (meaningful recurring revenue).
